name: get_course
description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific Coursera course by its ID or slug. Returns the full course description, syllabus modules, instructors, partner institution, estimated workload, difficulty level, and enrollment options.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The course ID or slug (URL-friendly name).

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include.

parameters.name: includes
parameters.description: Linked resources to include (e.g., instructorIds, partnerIds).

elements.name: Machine Learning
elements.description: Learn about the most effective machine learning techniques, and gain practice implementing them...
